name: Cucumber Salad With Ocean Trout Sashimi
directions: Cut the cucumbers into batons, and toss with a little salt.
Set aside one hour in a colander and allow to drain.
Rinse, drain and dry the cucumber, cover and chill.
Beat together the yoghurt, garlic, lime juice, herbs and pepper, fold in the cucumber and spoon into individual serving dishes.
Divide the sashimi between them and sprinkle with the nigella seeds.

name: Nw Trout With Mushrooms (Zwtiii)
directions: In a large skillet, saute mushrooms in 2 tablespoons butter until tender.
Stir in parsley.
Remove mushrooms to a serving platter; keep warm.
Combine flour and salt in a shallow dish; coat fillets with flour mixture on both sides.
Add 2 tablespoons butter to the skillet. Cook trout over medium heat for 8-10 minutes on each side or until fish flakes easily with a fork; arrange over mushrooms.
For sauce, melt remaining butter in a small saucepan.
Gradually stir in cream and lemon juice.
Bring to a boil for 3-4 minutes or until slightly thickened, stirring constantly. Serve over trout and mushrooms.

similar.name: Cucumber Salad With Ocean Trout Sashimi

name: Red Fish Meuniere Pecan
directions: Combine corn flower, white flour, creole seasoning, and white pepper together in a bowl or dish.
Heat olive oil and one tablespoon butter in large frying pan on Med heat.

Dredge red fish (can sub trout) in seasoned flour mixture, making sure to tap extra flour off before placing in hot pan. Turn heat to Med-High and let cook for about 3-4 minutes on each side, lightly shaking the pan by the handle over the heat for the first minute to avoid the fish from sticking (and again when you flip over).
Once fish is done remove and place on a plate or serving dish.

Immediately add butter, lemon juice, parsley, Worcestershire and sprinkle of salt to hot pan. Let butter melt and the sauce start to bubble, will turn a very light brownish color. Remove pan from heat and pour the butter/meuniere sauce over fillets.
Sprinkle fillets with toasted pecan pieces.
Serve with rice and veggies. I like to garnish with thin lemon wedges and fresh parsley.

similar.name: Cucumber Salad With Ocean Trout Sashimi

name: Parmesan Baked Trout
directions: In a small bowl mix flour, cornflour, onion powder, salt, paprika, and pepper.
Pour the melted butter into a shallow baking dish.
Dredge the cod in the flour mixture and place in the baking dish, turning each piece over to coat both sides with butter.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 15-20 minutes or until cod flakes easily with a fork.
Boil noodles till soft and place on centre of plate. Boil asparagus in saltwater for approximately 20 minutes or until tender.
Serve trout on top of noodles dressed with the asparagus, drizzle the butter over the top to complete.

similar.name: Cucumber Salad With Ocean Trout Sashimi

name: Parmesan Baked Trout

name: Trout Baked in Cream
directions: Wash and pat fish dry with paper towels.
Brush inside and out with lemon juice and sprinkle with dill weed, salt and pepper.
Place in lightly buttered baking dish,  Pour cream over.
Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
Bake at 400 degrees for 15 minute or until fish flakes easily when probed with a fork.  Or if fish is frozen, bake for 20-25 minute
Serve with green salad made with Boston lettuce, buttered, herbed new potatoes and green vegetables such as asparagus or baby peas.
